properties.description: Unique identifier for monthly aggregated risk record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null, Format: MRISK_{year}{month}
properties.business_description: Unique identifier combining year and month for monthly risk snapshots.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness, Ensure monthly records exist
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by year, Filter by specific month

properties.description: Calendar year of the monthly assessment.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be valid year
properties.business_description: Calendar year for annual reporting and year-over-year analysis.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate reasonable range, Ensure consistency with month dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific year, Compare years

properties.description: Month number (1-12).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 1 and 12
properties.business_description: Month identifier enabling seasonal analysis and month-over-month comparisons.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 1-12, Ensure consistency with monthStartDate
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific months, Filter by quarter
properties.aggregation_suggestions: GROUP BY month for seasonal patterns

properties.description: First day of the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be first day of month
properties.business_description: Month start boundary for consistent reporting periods.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate is first of month, Ensure not in future
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by quarter, Filter by year

properties.description: Last day of the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be last day of month
properties.business_description: Month end boundary completing the monthly reporting period.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate is last of month, Ensure consistency with monthStartDate
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Fiscal quarter (1-4).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 1 and 4
properties.business_description: Fiscal quarter for quarterly board reporting and strategic planning cycles.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 1-4, Ensure derived correctly from month
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific quarter, Compare quarters
properties.aggregation_suggestions: GROUP BY quarter, AVERAGE by quarter

properties.description: Average of daily risk scores across the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Primary monthly KPI smoothing short-term volatility to show sustained monthly risk levels for strategic assessment.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Compare with daily and weekly averages for consistency
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by threshold values, Filter by date range

properties.description: Highest daily average risk score during the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Should be >= avgMonthlyRiskScore
properties.business_description: Peak risk exposure during the month, indicating worst-case compliance state reached.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure >= avgMonthlyRiskScore
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high peaks (>90)

properties.description: Lowest daily average risk score during the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Should be <= avgMonthlyRiskScore
properties.business_description: Best compliance performance achieved during the month.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure <= avgMonthlyRiskScore
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Standard deviation of daily risk scores within the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Monthly risk stability indicator; high volatility suggests inconsistent compliance execution requiring process improvement.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Flag unusually high values (>15)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high volatility, Filter by date range

properties.description: Average daily total assignments across the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0
properties.business_description: Monthly average of daily assignment volumes, baseline for capacity planning and resource allocation.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Check for unusual fluctuations
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Average daily count of critical risk assignments.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Monthly average of sustained critical risk, key metric for board reporting and executive action.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Monitor for upward trends
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by increasing trends
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MOVING_AVERAGE(3 months), TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Average daily count of high risk assignments.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Monthly average of sustained elevated risk requiring ongoing management attention.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MOVING_AVERAGE(3 months), TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Average daily count of overdue assignments.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Monthly average of sustained compliance violations, critical for regulatory reporting and audit preparation.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Alert on increases
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by non-zero
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MOVING_AVERAGE(3 months), TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Total number of training completions during the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Monthly completion throughput indicating organizational training capacity and engagement momentum.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Check for unusual drops
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range

properties.description: Percentage of assignments completed during the month.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Monthly completion velocity, primary indicator of organizational compliance program effectiveness.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by low performance (<50%), Filter by date range

properties.description: Average daily count of assignments requiring manager escalation.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Monthly average of sustained management escalations, indicating level of manual intervention required.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by high volumes
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MOVING_AVERAGE(3 months), TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Percentage change in average risk score from previous month.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first month, Positive indicates increasing risk
properties.business_description: Month-over-month risk momentum, key indicator for quarterly business reviews and strategic planning.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate reasonable range (-50 to 50), Flag extreme changes (>15%)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by significant changes (>5%), Filter by increasing trends

properties.description: Overall risk trend for the month.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first month, Valid values: 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Categorical trend for executive dashboards and board presentations.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure consistency with monthOverMonthChange
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Increasing, Filter by Decreasing for improvement tracking

properties.description: Composite health score combining risk, completion rate, and overdue metrics (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Higher is better
properties.business_description: Executive KPI for board reporting, combining multiple dimensions into single health indicator (100 = perfect compliance).
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure inverse correlation with avgMonthlyRiskScore
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by poor health (<60), Filter by excellent health (>90)

properties.description: Risk score at same month in previous year for year-over-year comparison.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no prior year data, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Year-over-year benchmark for annual performance assessment and strategic goal setting.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure from prior year same month
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by available benchmarks

properties.description: Percentage change in risk score compared to same month previous year.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no prior year data, Negative is improvement
properties.business_description: Annual performance comparison for strategic program evaluation and annual reporting.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate reasonable range, Ensure based on same month prior year
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by improvement (negative values), Filter by degradation (positive values)

properties.description: Most common risk category for the month.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Valid values: 'Critical', 'High', 'Moderate', 'Low'
properties.business_description: Dominant risk level for the month, providing quick insight into overall risk profile.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific categories

properties.description: Seasonal adjustment factor based on historical patterns (0.5-2.0).
properties.business_rules: Can be null for insufficient history, Typically between 0.5 and 2.0, 1.0 = average
properties.business_description: Seasonal pattern indicator for improved forecasting, accounting for predictable monthly variations (e.g., year-end, summer).
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0.5-2.0, Check for reasonableness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high seasonality (>1.5 or <0.5)

properties.description: Gold layer table containing monthly aggregated compliance risk metrics providing strategic-level visibility for executive decision-making and long-term planning.
properties.business_purpose: Enables executive dashboards, board reporting, quarterly business reviews, annual strategic planning, and regulatory compliance reporting.
properties.data_lineage: Aggregated from ComplianceRisk_Daily table with monthly refresh, providing long-term trend visibility and strategic insights.
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 5 years for regulatory compliance and multi-year trend analysis.

properties.displayName: Monthly Aggregates to Daily Source Relationship
properties.description: Monthly summaries aggregate daily risk metrics for the month

properties.displayName: Monthly Aggregates to Silver Source Relationship
properties.description: Monthly summaries can also aggregate directly from Silver layer
